holdings.infoBox: CCFE is an equity ETF with a total of 22 individual holdings. The top holdings are First American Government Obligations Fund Class X stock at 12.54%, Cooper-Standard Holdings at 10.70%, WESCO International at 8.67%, Advance Auto Parts at 7.29%, and Premium Brands Holdings at 6.82%.

overview.description: The Concourse Capital Focused Equity ETF (CCFE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund targets investments towards undervalued securities with growth characteristics, located in North America. The fund is actively managed, using fundamental analysis to select and weight holdings CCFE was launched on Jun 12, 2025 and is issued by Concourse.
